name: GodMode
description: Personal AI Operating System for entrepreneurs

licenseKey.description: GodMode subscription license key (starts with GM-)

workspaceRoot.description: Root directory for GodMode data files

enabled.description: Enable Focus Pulse daily priority tracking in the topbar

coding.description: Coding task orchestration — worktrees, dispatch, validation, PRs

maxParallelWriters.description: Maximum concurrent write tasks (each gets its own worktree)

autoMerge.description: Auto-merge PRs to main after all validation gates pass (squash merge)

defaultRepoVisibility.description: Visibility for newly created repos (private or public)

validation.description: Validation gates run after each coding task completes

lint.description: Run pnpm lint after task completion

typecheck.description: Run pnpm tsc --noEmit after task completion

test.description: Run pnpm test --run after task completion

service.description: iMessage service: imessage, sms, or auto

accountId.description: Optional iMessage account id for outbound alerts

onlyWhenDesktopIdle.description: Only send notifications when desktop has been idle

desktopIdleSeconds.description: Required desktop idle duration before alerts are sent
